enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Nacka Romba Nacka conveys the playful and joyful aspects of love, highlighting the excitement and fun in romantic relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Masilamani, this song is a lively expression of the protagonist's feelings, showcasing the light-hearted moments in his romantic journey.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Benny Dayal and Rita, with music composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

Nacka Romba Nacka was released on May 23, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nacka Romba Nacka, the lively duet captures the essence of youthful love and exuberance, making it a standout track in Masilamani. The playful lyrics and upbeat rhythm evoke feelings of joy and celebration, perfectly aligning with the film's light-hearted narrative. As Benny Dayal and Rita harmonize, listeners are drawn into a world of romance and fun. This song is sure to resonate with anyone looking to celebrate love and happiness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nacka Romba Nacka from Masilamani is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, featuring the dynamic voices of Benny Dayal and Rita. This catchy duet, composed by D Imman, perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance and romance. Get ready to dance along to its infectious beats and playful lyrics that will surely lift your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: A lot of sadness comes when love is given, and that sadness is very deep. When love is given, it brings a lot of sorrow.
Love is like a small child. It grows until the end. If love is there, no one can see it, like a flower that blooms without being noticed. Na na na, sadness, sadness.
A lot of sadness comes when love is given, and that sadness is very deep. When love is given, it brings a lot of sorrow.

Everywhere, my heart melts slowly. Even in the midst of excitement, it is in a state of worship. I say this is the condition. Oh, this journey is crazy about love. Like a night without sleep, love doesn't end, you know... It doesn't go away without a trace...
A lot of sadness comes when love is given, and that sadness is very deep. When love is given, it brings a lot of sorrow.

If someone comes here to take away the hearts, if anyone cries here, it can bear the pain. Oh dear, without asking you, I have drawn a picture in my heart. Even if I close my eyes, I can touch you in my dreams. Flowers are given everywhere... My heart is standing still...
A lot of sadness comes when love is given, and that sadness is very deep. When love is given, it brings a lot of sorrow.
Love is like a small child. It grows until the end. If love is like a mirror, what happens if it breaks? Na na na, na na na, na na na.
